post.description: Produces a structured weekly-style plan. By default this is a deterministic mock plan suitable for demos and CI. Set `USE_ITERRA_AI_CALENDAR=true` with `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` configured to use `iterra_ai.CalendarEngine` (falls back to mock on LLM failure).

schema.title: Response List Calendars Api V1 Calendar  Get

post.description: Maps one idea to multiple platform shaped drafts using `iterra_ai.RepurposeEngine` (EXPERIMENTAL template path in the AI package — not a production LLM repurposing pipeline yet).

get.description: Lists all Iterra files in user's Drive. Files are in Drive — user downloads directly.

delete.description:
GDPR: Deletes all Iterra-created files from user's Drive.
Clears drive_file_id and drive_analysis_file_id from our DB.
Does NOT delete the user account or non-Iterra Drive files.

message.title: Message
message.default: Files listed from your Google Drive. Download them directly from Drive.
